About Me

Get to know me more...

BIO

Ahmed is a skilled cybersecurity consultant. Throughout his career, he has gained valuable insights and expertise working in various industries, including Financial Services, Consumer & Manufacturing, and Energy & Utility sectors.

As a consultant, Ahmed has demonstrated an exceptional ability to develop and implement effective third-party risk management strategies and best security practices. His approach is tailored to the unique needs and requirements of each industry he works in, ensuring that the solutions he provides are both practical and effective.

Ahmed has a deep understanding of the latest trends and threats in the cybersecurity landscape, which he leverages to provide valuable guidance and support to his clients. He has also been involved in conducting security audits, developing security policies and procedures, and delivering training and awareness programs to help organizations improve their security posture.

Overall, Ahmed is a knowledgeable and driven cybersecurity consultant who is dedicated to helping his clients stay safe in an increasingly digital world. He is committed to staying at the forefront of the field and to continuously learning and evolving his skillset to better serve his clients.
